name: Seamus
title: AKA Sebastian Baker

abilities.name: Bask in the Spotlight
abilities.text: After an enemy model within 4" gains an Entranced token, this model heals 1.

abilities.name: Stealth
abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.

abilities.name: Talent Scout
abilities.text: Once per activation. After an enemy model ends a move engaged by this model, if it is not that enemy model's activation, deal 2 damage to that model.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

actions.name: Grandiose Promises
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action has a raise value of 3. Move all enemies within (aura)2" of the target up to 2". Then, for each raise this action received, one other friendly model engaged with the target may declare a (melee) action.

triggers.name: That's Your Cue, Darling
triggers.text: Another ally in LoS of the target may move up to 6" toward the target.

triggers.name: Execute
triggers.text: The target may either discard a card or drain a (fortitude). If it does neither, it is killed.

actions.name: Special Arrangements
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy only. Remove an Entranced token from the target. Another ally within 6" of the target may place in base contact with the target and declare a (melee).

triggers.name: Murdered Suitor
triggers.text: The target must have half its maximum health or less. Summon a Dead Dandy with 3 health in base contact with the target.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='AKA Sebastian Baker' back='aka Sebastian Baker'
